action.reasoning: Observation: Two checkpoints exist - best.pt (from iter 12, EMA model val 0.849) and m1.pt (also from iter 12). Need to verify which is which and create ensemble predict.py. Checkpoint loading needs weights_only=False. Analysis: I should make predict.py load both checkpoints and ensemble. Decision: Update predict.py to ensemble best.pt + m1.pt with TTA, then submit eval.
action.command: python -c "import torch; c=torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('best:', c.get('val_bal'), c.get('arch'), c.get('epoch')); c=torch.load('checkpoints/m1.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('m1:', c.get('val_bal'), c.get('arch'), c.get('epoch'))"
